zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Purefoy於大約1400年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾德雷頓時，她的父親Richard Purefoy27歲，母親Katharine Purefoy21歲。她於1415年與Richard Knightley Of Fawsley在英國萊希斯特斯爾德雷頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1474年3月在英國諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利享年75歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Purefoy于大约1400年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾德雷頓时，她的父亲Richard Purefoy27岁，母亲Katharine Purefoy21岁。她于1415年与Richard Knightley Of Fawsley在英国萊希斯特斯爾德雷頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1474年3月在英国諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利享年75岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Purefoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French par fei ‘by (my) faith’, a nickname for someone who habitually used this expression. Compare Purifoy . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Purefoy was born about 1400, in Drayton, Leicestershire, England, her father, Richard Purefoy, was 27 and her mother, Katharine Purefoy, was 21. She married Richard Knightley Of Fawsley in 1415, in Drayton, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in March 1474, in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Purefoy est née environ 1400, à Drayton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Purefoy, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Katharine Purefoy, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Knightley Of Fawsley en 1415, à Drayton, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en mars 1474, à Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Purefoy um 1400 in Drayton, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Purefoy 27 und ihre Mutter Katharine Purefoy 21. Sie hat 1415 in Drayton, Leicestershire, England Richard Knightley Of Fawsley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im März 1474 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Purefoy è nata il circa 1400 nel Drayton, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Richard Purefoy, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Katharine Purefoy, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Richard Knightley Of Fawsley nel 1415, nel Drayton, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel marzo 1474, nel Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Purefoyが約1400年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアドレイトンで生まれた時，父Richard Purefoyは27歳，母Katharine Purefoyは21歳であった。1415年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアドレイトンでRichard Knightley Of Fawsleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1474年3月にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアファウスリーで75歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアファウスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Purefoy(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 레이스스터실르 드라이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Purefoy(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katharine Purefoy(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1415년 영국 레이스스터실르 드라이턴에서 Richard Knightley Of Fawsley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1474년 3월 영국 노르섬프토실르 파w슬리에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 파w슬리에 묻혔다.

mn.Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England, Unit: Fawsley, North Hamtunscire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Purefoy nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Purefoy, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Katharine Purefoy, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Knightley Of Fawsley em 1415, em Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em março de 1474, em Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Purefoy родилась около 1400 г. в местности дреитон, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Purefoy было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Katharine Purefoy, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Knightley Of Fawsley в 1415 г. в местности дреитон, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла марта 1474 г. в местности фавсли, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности фавсли, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Purefoy nació aproximadamente 1400, en Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Purefoy, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Katharine Purefoy, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Richard Knightley Of Fawsley en 1415, en Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en marzo de 1474, en Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
